task_objective: Refactor QAM-persistent frontend application cache state out of loose module globals and into a React context-backed singleton store.
design_decisions: Used a zero-dependency React context plus useSyncExternalStore instead of adding Zustand.
Scoped the refactor to application cache state and notification/tracking mirrors.
Left lifecycle registration and BrowserView status-strip module state unchanged.
Kept warmed QAM behavior and cache-current refresh short-circuit semantics intact.
Repaired _run_blocking cancellation cleanup with a daemon worker thread after the mandatory full-suite gate exposed the existing cancellation hang.
